summary: Strong modular design: clear separation between module logic, entry point, test runner, workflow. Excellent PowerShell practices (Set-StrictMode, -LiteralPath, injection). **Critical issue: actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to full commit SHA**—should be pinned per security best practices. Minor fixture duplication in Run-ActTests.ps1 (lines 130–170). Otherwise solid, production-ready pattern.
